subject.name: Kannan
subject.consistency: Maintain same appearance as previous scenes

elements: Tech keywords floating: AI, Gen AI, Chatbot, Internet, Python, VS Code

context.consistency: Maintain spatial continuity of bedroom layout

action.primary: Room transforms from normal bedroom into a futuristic sci-fi environment
action.subject_action: Kannan stands or sits in center, observing transformation
action.interaction: Kannan raises or slightly moves right hand, glow reflecting on index finger
action.visual_event: Neon lights activate, UI screens appear and float dynamically around him

camera.movement: Slow cinematic spin around Kannan (POV immersive rotation)
camera.focus: Kannan at center with environment transformation
camera.background: Softly blurred but filled with glowing elements

lighting.secondary: Holographic light sources from floating UI
effect: Glow reflecting on Kannan’s right-hand index finger

composition.visual_focus: Kannan centered with expanding sci-fi environment
